{{Quote|The Jedi sits among the dead, and claims that there is no pain…|Alto Stratus|<ref name="R56" />}}
'''Norcuna''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rutian/Legends|Rutian]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]], Norcuna was [[Jedi training/Legends|educated]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], eventually attaining the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a bloody conflict between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], erupted across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], Master Norcuna joined the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] as a [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] and led [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] on the frontlines.<ref name="R56" />

[[File:NorcunaDeath.jpg|thumb|left|[[Alto Stratus]] with Norcuna's head.]]

Early in the war, Master Norcuna was assigned to the [[Battle of Jabiim|massive Republic campaign]] on the world of [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]]. Along with Generals [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], [[Leska]], and [[Sirrus]], Master Norcuna fought long and hard on the rain-ravaged world, fighting near the city of [[Choal]]. When his forces were decimated by rebels under the leadership of [[Alto Stratus]], Master Norcuna was left to crawl through the mud as the opposition forces closed in on him. While the [[Jabiimi Nationalists]] looked on, Stratus grabbed Master Norcuna by one of his [[Lekku/Legends|lekku]] and beheaded him with his steel [[Sword/Legends|sword]] while the Jedi recited the [[Jedi Code/Legends|Jedi Code]]. Following Norcuna's death, Master Leska took command of his surviving troopers.<ref name="R56" />

==Behind the scenes==
In 2003, a [[Unidentified Twi'lek Jedi (Geonosis)|blue-skinned Twi'lek Jedi]] was included as part of [[Hasbro]]'s ''Jedi Knight Army'' multipack, however no canonical link has been established between the two characters.
